data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified choices to improve decision-making efficiency.
data.technical_spec: A/B testing to optimize user choices and minimize cognitive load.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Intuitive UI design for quick access to frequently-used actions.
data.technical_spec: Button size and positioning optimized based on interaction data.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent design patterns for improved user familiarity.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limiting the number of items displayed at once for better retention.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Group similar items for enhanced visual structure.
data.technical_spec: Product grouping based on category and utility.
